nasb.text: For Saul and they and all the men of Israel are in the valley of Elah, fighting with the Philistines.”

esv.text: Now Saul and they and all the men of Israel were in the Valley of Elah, fighting with the Philistines.

cnv.text: 掃羅和大衛的哥哥們，以及以色列眾人都在以拉谷與非利士人作戰。

ccb.text: 他们跟随扫罗率领的以色列军在以拉谷跟非利士人打仗。”
